title: Jericho's Pride

Formerly known as '''''Royal Flower''''', and sometimes referred to as '''''Josephine's Pride''''', '''''Jericho's Pride''''' was a personalized [[Mindabaal Custom]] pleasure yacht owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Jericho Donovan]] and [[Josephine Donovan]].<ref name="SOR" />

It was originally owned by [[James Ortell Donovan]] but stolen by his criminal daughter upon her graduation from the [[Mindabaal Royal Academy]] boarding school, and used by her in her career as a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]]. She modified it for the purpose. Later, upon being kidnapped by her own sister, Josephine Donovan became a regular crewmember on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], as the sisters pursued a smuggling career to thwart the cause of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="SOR" />

The sisters also used the alias '''''Josephine's Honor''''' when referring to the ship.<ref name="SOR" />
